definition: Material form or physical aspect within the analysis of experience.
notes: The project prefers form because it is compact and already familiar in aggregate analysis. Material form can help in explanatory prose where the physical dimension needs to be made explicit, but body is too narrow for the full range of rūpa.

context_rules.context: In most aggregate and doctrinal contexts
In explanatory prose distinguishing physicality from mental factors
context_rules.notes: Use when added clarity outweighs brevity.

example_phrases.notes: Shows the term in sense-field context.
